use_cases: Display status labels like 'new', 'featured', or 'sale' on product cards
Show category or tag information in content management systems
Indicate notification counts or alert badges in dashboards
Highlight feature labels in SaaS product marketing pages
Display user roles or permissions in admin interfaces
ai_summary: A versatile badge component with four style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) built with Tailwind CSS and class-variance-authority. Features hover color transitions and focus ring accessibility. Commonly used to display status labels, tags, categories, and notification indicators across SaaS products, e-commerce platforms, and admin dashboards.
